actionCalls.label: Create Records From Meeting Notes JSON

actionCalls.name: Scan_Image_of_Advisor_Meeting_Notes
actionCalls.label: Scan Image of Advisor Meeting Notes

value.stringValue: 使用對談手寫筆記內容

screens.name: Draft_Email_Screen
screens.label: 選擇收件人與寄送郵件

fields.name: Manual_Response_Screen_Header
fields.fieldText: 這是您與客戶對談的自動轉錄逐字稿

value.stringValue: AI 智能代理正在建立相關紀錄....
請稍候，AI 智能代理 正在為你撰寫電子郵件…
Standby as Agentforce extracts your meeting notes...
AI 智能代理正在分析逐字稿，約需 20-40 秒，請稍候…
正在產生你的會談筆記及待辦行動項目…
Take a picture of your handwritten notes or upload from photo gallery!

fields.name: Voice_Placeholder_Message
fields.fieldText: This feature is coming soon! Click Return to Main Menu to make another choice!

fields.name: Welcome_Screen_Title
fields.fieldText: 你可以使用語對紀錄內容、掃描影像，或是對談錄音

stages.name: Review_Agentforce_Analysis
stages.label: 檢視 AI 智能代理分析結果
